meta.description: AI-first ERP orchestration layer with a chat interface.

accent.description: Use for AI actions and important alerts

chat_bubble.user: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-6 py-4 shadow-sm max-w-[80%]
chat_bubble.ai: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-6 py-4 shadow-sm max-w-[80%] border border-border/50

input_area.wrapper: relative flex items-center w-full bg-background border border-input rounded-xl shadow-sm focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-primary/20 transition-all
input_area.input: flex-1 bg-transparent border-0 focus:ring-0 px-4 py-4 text-base placeholder:text-muted-foreground/70
input_area.button: p-2 mr-2 rounded-lg bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors

erp_card.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
erp_card.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-border bg-muted/30 flex justify-between items-center
erp_card.data_row: flex justify-between py-2 border-b border-border/50 last:border-0

sidebar.wrapper: hidden md:flex flex-col border-r border-border bg-muted/10 h-full
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground transition-colors

status_indicator.wrapper: flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-muted border border-border

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is slate-900 on white, slate-50 on slate-900.
accessibility.aria_labels: All interactive elements must have aria-label or visible label.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Fonts: Add the Google Fonts import to the head of index.html or top of index.css.
3. Layout: Create a 'ChatLayout' component that wraps the Sidebar and ChatArea.
4. State: Use a 'messages' array in state. Each message object should have { role: 'user' | 'assistant', content: string, type: 'text' | 'widget', widgetData?: any }.
5. Mocking: Mock the ERPNext API calls. Create a delay (e.g., 1000ms) to simulate network latency.
6. Widgets: Implement 'CustomerCard' and 'SalesOrderPreview' as widgets that can be rendered inside the chat stream.
7. Styling: Use the classes defined in 'components' section of this JSON. Override shadcn/ui defaults where necessary to match the 'Swiss Minimalist' aesthetic.
8. Testing: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers/inputs.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
